strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience demonstrated by GISCollective and Optilyz roles
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure contributions at re:cinq (MCP, agentic workflows)
Depth in real-time, low-latency systems (Dunnhumby media, RIDE Capital) with high-throughput data processing
concerns: Limited fintech-specific experience (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance) in resume
No documented production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated commercial environments
Short tenure at recent roles (e.g., re:cinq since April 2025) raises questions about long-term leadership fit
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq) and real-time systems (Dunnhumby media). However, the resume lacks fintech-specific context (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance) and multi-agent AI systems in production. His leadership track record is unclear due to short tenures at recent roles, though his technical depth in event-driven architectures is notable.
